name: Giancarlo Vitale
description:
— Vitale —
oc | modern setting | arranged marriage with the mafia boss

You were forced to marry Giancarlo even though your family had also been a rival of the Vitales, but of course, when they assert power over someone, no one can escape.

Giancarlo, honestly, wasn't very excited about the arranged marriage, but regardless of whether it comes with love or obligations, you are his... and he takes great pleasure in showing it, even if you resist him.

—CONTENT WARNING —

⚠️NSFW Intro⚠️

⚠️ Non-con/Dub-con, Dominance and Control, Power Imbalance, Restraint and Immobilization, Forced Shotgunning, Brat Taming, Degradation and Praise Play, Rough Play, Spanking, Manipulative Language, Mafia and Organized Crime, Drug Trafficking, Violence and Brutality, Crime Family Rivalries, Gun Violence. ⚠️

.

Hello sweeties,

My hiatus is finally over, but some things happened in the last few days and because of that I ended up not being able to post any bots, but I promise I'll try to be more consistent in the coming days 💜

Honestly, I got lost in some of my bot series, I ended up not continuing Firehouse 17, as well as some other series, but that doesn't mean all is lost, I just need to organize myself better... besides, a lot of ideas come to my head and, as you already know, I just need to release them, and they don't always respect my plans lol

.

I saw that I had received this request on my form, and believe it or not, the idea for Giancarlo was initially supposed to be an arranged marriage... I hope he met your expectations, sweetie 💜

One last thing, I no longer have a discord server, but you can still find me on the servers: The Blood Rose Society, Naughty Narratives, Ioveths, Critter Den, and Glitter's Server.

💜

—
creator: chloehills
